free_text: Measurement of 14.7 MeV Neutron Cross Sections for
Each sample, with a purity higher than 99% (supplied
by The Reactor Experiments, USA) and of 0.5 inch
diameter and 0.005 inch thickness, was packed together
in two aluminium foils to form a sandwich.
110 cm**3 HP Ge detector with a resolution
1.85 keV at 1.33 MeV and a relative efficiency of 10%
Neutron energy as a function of the emission angle
was determined via the Nb-Zr activity ratio method.
VS. REACTION corrected c.f. Memo CP-D/0954.
Compiler assumes that 8.1 sec M1 state is included.
